'''''Magnus''''' was a [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

The ''Magnus'' delivered supplies to the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Jeffrey]]'' in the [[Cron Drift/Legends|Cron Drift]]. An Imperial force consisting of four transports, escorted by [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] attacked the rendezvous but were defeated by [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] flown by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] and [[Puck Naeco/Legends|Puck Naeco]], allowing the transfer to take place.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1stm}}
